violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Shelving units, in the basement, constructed of wood have not been sealed. Bare wood surfaces should not be used for storage.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use items were found on the floor of the basement storage area. Single use items should be stored off of the floor.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. Handwashing sink was found with dirty pans in the basin, making it inaccessible. Handwashing sinks should be available at all times.
